summary: Comprehensive testing completed for 3 new features: 1) Circular logo with object-cover styling, 2) 'Families Catered So Far..' delivery section with admin management, 3) Car status badges (Available/Booked/Sold) with Recently Sold section. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: FEATURE 1 - Circular Logo: Logo fills circle with object-cover class in Navbar
FEATURE 1 - Circular Logo: Logo visible in Footer
FEATURE 1 - Circular Logo: Logo visible on Admin Login page
FEATURE 1 - Circular Logo: Logo visible in Admin Dashboard navbar
FEATURE 2 - Deliveries Section: 'Families Catered So Far..' section shows on homepage
FEATURE 2 - Deliveries Section: Delivery cards show car name, customer name, and location
FEATURE 2 - Deliveries Section: 2 delivery cards displayed with images
FEATURE 2 - Admin Deliveries: 'Deliveries' tab present in Admin Dashboard
FEATURE 2 - Admin Deliveries: 'Add Delivery' button opens form
FEATURE 2 - Admin Deliveries: Form has Image URL, Car Name, Customer Name, Location fields
FEATURE 2 - Admin Deliveries: Deliveries table shows existing deliveries
FEATURE 3 - Status Badges: Car cards show colored status badges (Green: Available)
FEATURE 3 - Status Badges: Inventory page has Status filter dropdown with All/Available/Booked/Sold options
FEATURE 3 - Status Badges: Status filter correctly filters cars
FEATURE 3 - Recently Sold: 'Recently Sold' section shows on homepage
FEATURE 3 - Recently Sold: Sold/Booked cars show grayscale images
FEATURE 3 - Recently Sold: Sold cars show 'SOLD OUT' disabled button
FEATURE 3 - Recently Sold: Booked cars show 'BOOKED' disabled button
FEATURE 3 - Recently Sold: Prices shown with strikethrough
FEATURE 3 - Admin Status: Car table has Status column with colored badges
FEATURE 3 - Admin Status: Car form has Status dropdown (Available/Booked/Sold)
Backend API: GET /api/delivery-images returns delivery list
Backend API: GET /api/delivery-images?limit=2 returns limited results
Backend API: POST /api/delivery-images requires authentication
Backend API: POST /api/delivery-images creates delivery with auth
Backend API: DELETE /api/delivery-images requires authentication
Backend API: GET /api/cars returns cars with status field
Backend API: GET /api/cars/recently-sold returns sold/booked cars only
Backend API: POST /api/cars can create car with status field
Backend API: PUT /api/cars/{id} can update car status
Backend API: Admin login works with admin@truvant.com / Admin@123
critical_code_review_comments: CircularLogo component correctly uses object-cover and border-radius: 50% for proper image filling
Delivery images API properly validates authentication for create/delete operations
Car status field defaults to 'Available' for backward compatibility with existing cars
seed_data_creation: 2 test deliveries exist in database (2022 Honda City - Priya Gupta, 2023 Maruti Swift - Rahul Sharma). 2 sold/booked cars exist (Honda Civic - Sold, Skoda Superb - Booked)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified: 1) CircularLogo component with object-cover styling visible in Navbar, Footer, Admin Login, Admin Dashboard. 2) 'Families Catered So Far..' section on homepage shows delivery cards with car name, customer name, location. Admin Dashboard has Deliveries tab with add/delete functionality. 3) Car status badges (Green: Available, Yellow: Booked, Red: Sold) visible on car cards. Inventory page has status filter. Recently Sold section shows sold/booked cars with disabled buttons and grayscale images. Admin car form has Status dropdown.

mocked_apis_list: Email notifications require RESEND_API_KEY - currently logged only, not sent
